Package org.eventb.internal.core.indexers

Class EventBIndexer

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.indexers.Cancellable
org.eventb.internal.core.indexers.EventBIndexer
All Implemented Interfaces:
IIndexer
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContextIndexer, MachineIndexer
public abstract class EventBIndexer extends Cancellable implements IIndexer

    • index

      public final boolean index(IIndexingBridge bridge)
      Description copied from interface: IIndexer
      Indexes the given file and sends results through calls to the given IIndexingBridge. The return value indicates whether indexing was successful.
      Specified by:
      index in interface IIndexer
      Parameters:
      bridge - the indexing facility to which to send results
      Returns:
      whether indexing was successful
      See Also:
      • IIndexingBridge

    • index

      protected abstract void index(IInternalElement root) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • getDependencies

      public IRodinFile[] getDependencies(IInternalElement root)
      Description copied from interface: IIndexer
      Computes and returns the dependencies of the given file.

      For instance, if file1 depends on file2 and file3 (i.e file1 is allowed to contain occurrences of elements exported by file2 and file3), then a call to getDependencies(file1) will return { file2, file3 }.

      Specified by:
      getDependencies in interface IIndexer
      Parameters:
      root - the root element of the file for which dependencies have to be extracted
      Returns:
      an array containing the file dependencies.

    • getDeps

      protected abstract IRodinFile[] getDeps(IInternalElement root) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
